Product Details
INA Oil Seals

Compact rotary sealing solutions suited to bearing positions and transmission assemblies with limited radial installation space.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

INA Oil Seals

A practical choice for precision bearing and shaft positions that need low-friction sealing within a compact envelope.

CHX INA-type Oil Seals reference compact sealing ring concepts commonly used around needle bearing and transmission arrangements, supporting lubricant retention and contamination control in tight spaces.

Compact Envelope

Suitable for bearing positions where radial installation space is limited.

Low-Friction Sealing

Supports efficient sealing while helping to control friction and temperature rise.

Bearing Protection

Helps prevent lubricant loss and contamination ingress in precision rotating assemblies.
